original.query: I’m trying to pitch myself for a project where the hardest part is tuning a progression/score system so it stays fair under extreme scaling, edge-case thresholds, and lots of interacting rules. Based on what you know about my background, what kind of role should I position myself for, and what’s the one most relevant skill I should emphasize to make the pitch credible?
